metadata.description: Detects the presence of a credential stealer binary
metadata.author: me

signatures.description: Checks if process is being debugged by a debugger
signatures.name: checks_debugger

signatures.description: This executable has a PDB path
signatures.name: has_pdb

signatures.description: Checks amount of memory in system, this can be used to detect virtual machines that have a low amount of memory available

T1082.long: An adversary may attempt to get detailed information about the operating system and hardware, including version, patches, hotfixes, service packs, and architecture.

signatures.name: antivm_memory_available

signatures.description: Allocates read-write-execute memory (usually to unpack itself)
signatures.name: allocates_rwx

signatures.description: The binary likely contains encrypted or compressed data indicative of a packer

T1045.long: Software packing is a method of compressing or encrypting an executable. Packing an executable changes the file signature in an attempt to avoid signature-based detection. Most decompression techniques decompress the executable code in memory.

marks.description: A section with a high entropy has been found
Overall entropy of this PE file is high

signatures.name: packer_entropy
